title: dialog-replay-redaction — C4 model
description: Component-level view of the four-piece refit. Scope: SessionCompaction module, post-anchor render path, working-cache recall integration. External boundaries unchanged.

systems.name: OpenCode runtime
systems.description: Single-process bun daemon hosting session runloop, compaction, provider integrations, storage, and MCP tool surface.

systems.name: Codex Responses API backend
systems.description: External chatgpt.com /backend-api/codex endpoints. /responses for completion; /responses/compact for server-side compaction.

containers.name: SessionCompaction module
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/compaction.ts. Owns kind chain, anchor write, recompress dispatch.

containers.name: Session memory derivation
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/memory.ts. Derives turnSummaries from messages stream; renders for LLM/human.

containers.name: Post-anchor render transformer
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/post-anchor-transform.ts. Walks post-anchor stream, currently drops completed assistants (v6); after this spec, redacts tool result payloads (v7).

containers.name: Working cache (L1 digest + L2 ledger)
containers.description: packages/opencode/src/session/working-cache.ts. L2 ledger derived from Session.messages; recall_toolcall_* MCP family resolves part.id to original output.

containers.name: Session storage
containers.description: Storage router + SQLite. Source of truth for messages and parts. Tool outputs persist here regardless of anchor body redaction.

containers.name: Tweaks runtime config
containers.description: /etc/opencode/tweaks.cfg + Tweaks.compactionSync(). Hot-reloaded; no daemon restart needed.

containers.name: Event Bus
containers.description: In-process Bus.publish + GlobalBus EventEmitter. Telemetry channel.

components.name: tryNarrative (extend kind)
components.description: Lines 959-975. Builds anchor body for the narrative kind. Post-fix: anchor[n].text + serializeRedactedDialog(tail excluding unanswered user msg).

components.name: compactWithSharedContext
components.description: Lines 512-680. Persists the anchor message with summary text. Post-fix: receives observed parameter for telemetry threading.

components.name: scheduleHybridEnrichment (recompress dispatcher)
components.description: Lines 1454-1660. Post-fix: removes observed-gate, adds 50K ceiling, dispatches by provider (codex vs other).

components.name: tryLowCostServer (codex /responses/compact)
components.description: Lines 1056-1110. Existing server-side compact path used by KIND_CHAIN; now also reusable by recompress for codex sessions.

components.name: Hybrid.runHybridLlm (llm-agent recompress)
components.description: Lines 2105+. Existing LLM-based compaction body; reused by recompress for non-codex sessions.

components.name: Anchor in-place update STEP 3
components.description: Lines 1546-1660. Existing 'narrative anchor → refined anchor' overwrite logic. Reused by both codex and non-codex recompress paths.

components.name: Anchor staleness check (interloper detection)
components.description: Lines 1573-1600. Existing concurrent-compaction safeguard. Reused as-is.

components.name: serializeRedactedDialog (NEW)
components.description: New file packages/opencode/src/session/dialog-serializer.ts. Pure function. Markdown grammar: ## Round N + role markers + recall_id refs.

components.name: findUnansweredUserMessageId (shared with Spec 1)
components.description: Walks tail backward to identify most-recent unanswered user msg. Used by both serializeRedactedDialog (exclude) and Spec 1 replay helper (snapshot).

components.name: Memory.read
components.description: Lines 83-180. Derives SessionMemory from messages stream. Post-fix: lastTextPartText accepts reasoning channel; renamed to lastNarrativePartText.

components.name: renderForLLMSync
components.description: Lines 244-289. Post-fix: demoted to fallback role (legacy tryNarrative path when feature flag off; renderForHumanSync continues using turnSummaries).

components.name: transformPostAnchorTail (v6 → v7)
components.description: Post-fix: replaces drop-based logic with redact-only. Walks parts, replaces tool.state.output with `[recall_id: <part.id>]` placeholder.

components.name: redactToolPart (NEW helper)
components.description: New helper inside transformPostAnchorTail. Pure function: input ToolPart, output ToolPart with state.output redacted.

components.name: deriveLedger (L2 ledger)
components.description: Lines 514-555. Walks Session.messages; emits LedgerEntry per completed ToolPart. messageRef = part.id. No change required.

components.name: recall_toolcall_raw MCP tool
components.description: MCP family handler. Resolves part.id from anchor body's recall_id reference back to original tool output text via deriveLedger.

components.name: Messages + parts (SQLite)
components.description: ORDER BY id DESC stream. Tool outputs persist here regardless of anchor body redaction. Source of truth for recall.

relationships.description: loads previous anchor message via Memory.Hybrid.getAnchorMessage
(NEW) detects unanswered user msg id to exclude from serialisation
(NEW) serialises tail messages to markdown text
writes summary-true assistant message + compaction part
publishes Compacted with {observed, kind} eventMeta (post-fix threading)
loads current anchor for size estimation
reads ceiling threshold and master flag
(NEW) dispatches to server-side compact when provider == codex AND anchorTokens > ceiling
dispatches to LLM-grade compaction when provider != codex AND anchorTokens > ceiling (existing path, observed-gate removed)
verifies anchor latest before in-place update
overwrites narrative-extended body with LLM-distilled body on success
POST /responses/compact with anchor body as conversationItem
checks enable_dialog_redaction_anchor; falls back to v6 if disabled
reads part.id (no write; redaction is render-time only)
resolves part.id from anchor body recall_id reference
walks messages, finds part with matching id, returns state.output
derives turnSummaries from full messages stream (not slice)
